evals.prompt: Audit the SEO on this Astro site and propose the first changes.
evals.expected_behavior: Confirms Astro config/site origin first, audits technical SEO surfaces, and separates metadata copy review from implementation.
assertions: Reads astro.config/package setup before proposing canonical or sitemap work
Checks metadata, structured data, OG, sitemap/robots/RSS, and indexing surfaces
Mentions writing-and-editing only for generated short strings or prose follow-up

evals.prompt: Check these title tags and descriptions for truncation and rewrite weak ones.
evals.expected_behavior: Routes the copy-only task away from Astro technical SEO.
assertions: Does not treat copy-only metadata review as an Astro SEO implementation task
